title: MeshForce
description: MeshForce: Gives a full set of shell and membrane forces at a discrete location in the Panel/FEMesh.

NXX.description: Axial/membrane force in x-direction. Property has a quantity of type ForcePerUnitLength measured in [N/m].

NYY.description: Axial/membrane force in y-direction. Property has a quantity of type ForcePerUnitLength measured in [N/m].

NXY.description: Axial/membrane force in xy-direction. Property has a quantity of type ForcePerUnitLength measured in [N/m].

MXX.description: Bending moment in x-direction. Property has a quantity of type ForcePerUnitLength measured in [N/m].

MYY.description: Bending moment in y-direction. Property has a quantity of type MomentPerUnitLength measured in [N.m/m].

MXY.description: Bending moment in xy-direction. Property has a quantity of type MomentPerUnitLength measured in [N.m/m].

VX.description: Shear force in x-direction. Property has a quantity of type ForcePerUnitLength measured in [N/m].

VY.description: Shear force in y-direction. Property has a quantity of type ForcePerUnitLength measured in [N/m].

ModeNumber.description: Positive index, starting at one. Only set for cases with modal outputs such as dynamic cases.

TimeStep.description: Time step for time history results.

LayerPosition.description: Position within the element thickness that result is extracted from, normalised to 1. I.e. 0 = lower surface, 0.5 = middle, 1 = top surface.

_t.description: Optional Type disciminator for BHoM type.

_bhomVersion.description: Optional Version of BHoM used when generating the object.
